mapper.select:
SELECT M.MEM_NO, M.MEM_ID, M.STUDENT_NO, M.MEM_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, U.UNI_NAME, M.PHONE, M.CREATE_DATE, M.STATUS FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO WHERE M.MEM_NO != 0
AND U.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND ( ( M.STATUS = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM AUTHORITIES A WHERE A.MEM_NO = M.MEM_NO AND A.AUTHORITY = 'ROLE_USER' ) ) OR M.STATUS = 'B' OR M.STATUS = 'N' )
AND
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.STUDENT_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.STATUS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.STUDENT_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.STATUS = #{keyword}
ORDER BY M.MEM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUTHORITIES (MEM_NO, AUTHORITY, UNI_NO) SELECT #{memNo}, #{authority}, D.UNI_NO FROM MEMBER M JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO WHERE M.MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT M.MEM_NO, M.MEM_ID, M.STUDENT_NO, M.MEM_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, U.UNI_NAME, M.PHONE, M.CREATE_DATE, M.STATUS FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON M.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
M.MEM_NO != 0
AND U.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND M.STATUS = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM AUTHORITIES A WHERE A.MEM_NO = M.MEM_NO AND A.AUTHORITY = 'ROLE_USER' )
AND
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( M.MEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(M.STUDENT_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY M.MEM_NO

SELECT D.DEPT_NO, D.DEPT_NAME, D.UNI_NO, U.UNI_NAME FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
D.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND
D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
U.UNI_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY D.DEPT_NAME ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_DEPT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DEPARTMENT VALUES( #{deptNo}, #{uniNo}, #{deptName} )
mapper.select:
SELECT L.LECTURE_NO, L.DEPT_NO, U.UNI_NAME, D.DEPT_NAME, L.LECTURE_NAME, L.PROFESSOR_NAME FROM LECTURE L LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON L.DEPT_NO = D.DEPT_NO LEFT JOIN UNIVERSITY U ON D.UNI_NO = U.UNI_NO
D.UNI_NO = #{uniNo}
AND
D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( D.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.LECTURE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.PROFESSOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY L.LECTURE_NO DESC

SELECT u.uni_no, u.uni_name, m.mem_id, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m JOIN department d ON m.dept_no = d.dept_no WHERE d.uni_no = u.uni_no AND d.dept_no != 0 ) AS count, u.status FROM university u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.uni_no = d.uni_no LEFT JOIN member m ON d.dept_no = m.dept_no WHERE d.dept_name = '공통교양'
AND u.uni_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND m.mem_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY u.uni_name
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_uni.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO university VALUES(#{uniNo}, #{uniName})
